en: Praise the LORD!Praise God in his sanctuary; praise him in his mighty heavens!
zh: 你們要讚美耶和華。 要在 神的聖所讚美他， 要在他顯能力的穹蒼下讚美他。

en: Praise him for his mighty deeds; praise him according to his excellent greatness!
zh: 要因他大能的作為讚美他， 要因他無限的偉大讚美他。

en: Praise him with trumpet sound; praise him with lute and harp!
zh: 要吹角讚美他， 要鼓瑟彈琴讚美他。

en: Praise him with tambourine and dance; praise him with strings and pipe!
zh: 要擊鼓跳舞讚美他， 要彈奏絲弦的樂器和吹簫讚美他。

en: Praise him with sounding cymbals; praise him with loud clashing cymbals!
zh: 要用聲音洪亮的鈸讚美他， 要用聲音鏗鏘的鈸讚美他。

en: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD! Praise the LORD!
zh: 凡有氣息的，都要讚美耶和華。 你們要讚美耶和華。
